project.component: { "keyToString": { "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "D:/个人知识体系/编程开发/02_后端/01_java入门教程/02_java核心语法/02_课堂代码与练习/02_流程控制/Flow Control", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm",
